__inputs.name: DS_LOKI
__inputs.label: Loki
__inputs.description: Loki datasource for server heartbeat logs

description:
Per-server view of GPU allocation, utilization, Kueue queue health, and borrowed GPUs from heartbeat telemetry.

Limitations:
1. Supports up to 8 K8s contexts per server (indices 0-7)
2. Supports up to 3 cluster queues per context (indices 0-2)
3. Per-GPU-type breakdown not available (dynamic keys can't be iterated in LogQL)
4. Borrowed GPUs assumes nvidia.com/gpu is at resources index 2 (cpu=0, memory=1, gpu=2)
5. For precise GPU-hours and ROI calculations, use analyze_heartbeat_roi.py

targets.expr:
sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[0].gpus.allocated" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range]))
+ (sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[1].gpus.allocated" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range])) or vector(0))
+ (sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[2].gpus.allocated" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range])) or vector(0))
+ (sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[3].gpus.allocated" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range])) or vector(0))
+ (sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[4].gpus.allocated" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range])) or vector(0))
+ (sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[5].gpus.allocated" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range])) or vector(0))
+ (sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[6].gpus.allocated" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range])) or vector(0))
+ (sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[7].gpus.allocated" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range])) or vector(0))

sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[0].gpus.total" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range]))
+ (sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[1].gpus.total" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range])) or vector(0))
+ (sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[2].gpus.total" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range])) or vector(0))
+ (sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[3].gpus.total" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range])) or vector(0))
+ (sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[4].gpus.total" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range])) or vector(0))
+ (sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[5].gpus.total" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range])) or vector(0))
+ (sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[6].gpus.total" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range])) or vector(0))
+ (sum(last_over_time({type="server_heartbeat"} | json server_hash="server_hash", val="plugins.billing.contexts[7].gpus.total" | server_hash="$server_hash" | unwrap val [$__range])) or vector(0))

list.description: Server hash to filter heartbeat data. Select a known server or type a custom hash.
list.label: Server Hash
list.name: server_hash

title: SkyPilot Heartbeat - Per Server
